name: Chicago Crunchy Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugars until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg, milk, and vanilla extract.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the flour, salt, and baking powder.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with the oil, until combined.
5. Stir in the quick oats, corn flakes, and chocolate chips.
6. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 13 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Makes 7 dozen cookies.
